# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries

//Executable for running MPI programs.
MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/leonardo/prod/spack/06/install/0.22/linux-rhel8-icelake/gcc-8.5.0/intel-oneapi-mpi-2021.12.1-s5hpfy2ffuow455bu7uzjbfizbfq3znr/mpi/2021.12/bin/mpiexec

//Maximum number of processors available to run MPI applications.
MPIEXEC_MAX_NUMPROCS:STRING=64

//Flag used by MPI to specify the number of processes for mpiexec;
// the next option will be the number of processes.
MPIEXEC_NUMPROC_FLAG:STRING=-n

//These flags will be placed after all flags passed to mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_POSTFLAGS:STRING=

//These flags will be directly before the executable that is being
// run by mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_PREFLAGS:STRING=

//MPI Fortran additional include directories
MPI_Fortran_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

MPI_rt_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/librt.so

//Path to a library.
M_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libm.so

//Arguments to supply to pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN:STRING=

//pkg-config executable
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/pkg-config

//print program time in seconds
QE_CLOCK_SECONDS:BOOL=OFF

//C preprocessor for qe_preprocess_source in qeHelpers.cmake
QE_CPP:STRING=cpp

//C preprocessor full path
QE_CPP_FULL_PATH:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cpp

//enable CUDA acceleration on NVIDIA GPUs
QE_ENABLE_CUDA:BOOL=OFF

//enable distributed execution support via MPI
QE_ENABLE_MPI:BOOL=ON

//enable GPU aware MPI operations
QE_ENABLE_MPI_GPU_AWARE:BOOL=OFF

//use MPI via Fortran module instead of mpif.h header inclusion
QE_ENABLE_MPI_MODULE:BOOL=ON

//enable OpenACC acceleration
QE_ENABLE_OPENACC:BOOL=OFF

//enable distributed execution support via OpenMP
QE_ENABLE_OPENMP:BOOL=OFF

//enable execution of NVIDIA NVTX profiler plugin
QE_ENABLE_PROFILE_NVTX:BOOL=OFF

//enable SCALAPACK execution units
QE_ENABLE_SCALAPACK:BOOL=ON

//enable execution tracing output
QE_ENABLE_TRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Semicolon-separated list of extra global definitions
QE_EXTRA_DEFINITIONS:STRING=

//select a specific FFTW library [Intel_DFTI, Intel_FFTW3, ArmPL,
// IBMESSL, FFTW3, Internal]
QE_FFTW_VENDOR:STRING=Intel_FFTW3

//Installation directory of SCALAPACK library
SCALAPACK_DIR:PATH=

//Installation directory of SCALAPACK library
SCALAPACK_DIR_FOUND:PATH=/leonardo/prod/spack/06/install/0.22/linux-rhel8-icelake/gcc-8.5.0/intel-oneapi-mkl-2024.0.0-mgclo5ulk2icemqudcxmv4fmxxy2ss7p/mkl/2024.0
